title: ERCOT AS Deployment Factors Daily RUC CSV download
description:
Ancillary Service Deployment Factors (ASDFs) utilized by the Daily Reliability Unit Commitment (DRUC) process in ERCOT.

ASDFs range from 0 to 1 and represent the percentage of a particular ancillary service type that is assumed to be deployed. These values are derived from actual system conditions as well as forecasts, including demand and production from solar and wind.

Implemented on December 5th, 2025, as part of ERCOT's RTC+B project.
